title: Psychological Disorders
learningObjectives: Define psychological disorders and explain how they are distinguished from typical behavior
Describe the major classification systems used to diagnose psychological disorders and the controversies surrounding them
Identify the symptoms, causes, and prevalence of the major categories of psychological disorders including anxiety, mood, psychotic, dissociative, and personality disorders
Explain the biological, psychological, and sociocultural perspectives on the origins of psychological disorders
Recognize the importance of using person-first, non-stigmatizing language when discussing psychological disorders
